notes: VIFOR wind farm, Buzau County, Romania; cross-border VPPA; first cross-border wind PPA in Bulgaria; Etem Gestamp's third PPA overall; Rezolv Energy's seventh PPA in Romania and Bulgaria; Bekaert also signed a 10-year VPPA for 100 GWh/year from VIFOR wind farm in 2024
80% wind, 20% solar; backed by guarantees of origin certificates; supports Gestamp's decarbonisation and cost stability
Project name: Vilecha PV complex; four interconnected 50MW plants; grid connection to 132kV substation; facilitated by ZConsultores Energéticos
Four projects: Wydartowo, Bieżyce, Ostrzeniewo III, Nowy Zagór III; operational in 2027; signed via Sustainability Roundtable’s Net Zero Consortium for Buyers (NZCB)
Lancaster Solar Park, Victoria; 108 MW DC; expected operational in 2026; part of Apple's strategy to bring over 1 million MWh of new renewable electricity online annually in Australia before 2030
Projects: Wichita solar farm (805MW) in Wichita County, Mustang Creek solar farm (195MW) in Johnson County; both expected to reach commercial operations in Q2 2026

Hybrid PPA covering 11 wind and solar assets; projects include Esquileo, Dehesilla I, Dehesilla II, San Lorenzo C, San Lorenzo D, and La Dehesica; part of Trafigura's European power portfolio expansion.
